task_completion.description: The agent opened the draft document in Calligra Words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words application window is open, displaying the unformatted or partially formatted text of the sepsis protocol.

task_completion.description: The title and main sections are formatted appropriately (e.g., Heading 1 style).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'ADULT SEVERE SEPSIS AND SEPTIC SHOCK PROTOCOL' and main sections like 'Purpose', 'Definitions', 'Required Equipment', etc., appear larger and bolder than the regular body text, indicating a Heading style has been applied.

task_completion.description: The 'Required Equipment' and 'Interventions' sections are formatted as lists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Bullet points or numbers appear next to the items under the 'Required Equipment' and 'Interventions' sections (should be at least 8 items total).

task_completion.description: The body text paragraphs are justified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The standard body text blocks have straight, flush edges on both the left and right margins, rather than a ragged right edge.

task_completion.description: The 'CLINICAL ALERT' blocks are bolded and dual-indented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Paragraphs containing 'CLINICAL ALERT' are in bold text and are visibly indented from both the left and right margins compared to the rest of the justified body text.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the new filename adult_sepsis_protocol_FINAL.odt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of Calligra Words shows 'adult_sepsis_protocol_FINAL.odt', or a file manager/save dialog shows the file successfully saved in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used Calligra Words to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words GUI is visible in the screenshots with the document loaded and being edited.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like python scripts, sed, or awk modifying the .odt files directly.

integrity.description: The agent opened the style guide to read the formatting instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer showing 'protocol_style_guide.txt' is visible in at least one screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Title text: 'ADULT SEVERE SEPSIS AND SEPTIC SHOCK PROTOCOL'. Main sections to be formatted as Heading 1: 'Purpose', 'Definitions', 'Required Equipment', 'Assessment Criteria', 'Interventions', 'Documentation'. Alert snippets to be bolded and dual-indented (approx 0.4-0.5 inches): 'Do not delay antibiotic administration while waiting' and 'Patients with heart failure or end-stage renal disease'. Body text paragraphs to be justified include those starting with 'To provide evidence-based guidelines...', 'Sepsis is defined as...', 'Evaluate patients for...', and 'All interventions...'. There should be at least 8 list items in total across the equipment and interventions sections.
